$comment: Generated by scripts/generate-token-manifest.mjs (HANDOFF-CONSOLE-DIMENSIONALITY X2). Every --ij-*, --rec-* and --gy-* name the console emits, the register file that owns it, and that file's provenance. Components may not mint register tokens; scripts/check-token-manifest.mjs fails on any drift between this file and the registers.
